基于多框架标准（ISO 25010、OpenSSF、Shneiderman及智能体启发式方法）评估Clawdbot技能的质量、可靠性与发布就绪度。用于发布前审查、审计、评分或质量检测。执行自动化结构检查，指导人工评估25项指标。
  - version: 1.0.0
app-builder  App Builder
  - Build, edit, and deploy Instant-backed apps using npx instant-cli, create-instant-app (Next.js + Codex), GitHub (gh), and Vercel (vercel). Use when asked to create a new app, modify an existing app, fix bugs, add features, or deploy/update an app. Projects live under ~/apps; always work inside the relevant app folder.
使用 instant-cli、create-instant-app（Next.js + Codex）、GitHub 和 Vercel 构建、编辑和部署 Instant 应用。用于创建、修改、修复、添加功能或部署更新应用。项目位于 ~/apps，始终在对应应用目录内操作。
  - version: 1.0.0
multi-viewpoint-debates  Multi-viewpoint Debates
  - Spawn isolated sub-agents representing distinct worldviews (Elon, Capitalist, Monkey) to debate decisions from multiple angles. Expose blind spots by forcing genuine disagreement on important questions. Use when facing decisions where you need to challenge your assumptions, stress-test ideas, or see a problem through fundamentally different lenses. Automatically captures debate outputs to an archive for future reference and pattern analysis.
生成代表不同世界观（马斯克、资本家、猴子）的独立子代理进行多角度辩论，强制真实分歧以暴露盲点。适用于挑战假设、压力测试想法或换视角审视问题的场景。自动归档辩论记录供后续模式分析。
  - version: 1.0.0
douyin-video-fetch  Douyin Video Fetch
  - 下载抖音视频到本地（无水印优先）。用于给后续视频分析/复刻提供原始素材，支持 URL 或 video_id 输入、批量列表输入与统一输出目录。
下载抖音视频到本地（无水印优先）。用于给后续视频分析/复刻提供原始素材，支持 URL 或 video_id 输入、批量列表输入与统一输出目录。
  - version: 1.0.0
context-budgeting  Context Budgeting
  - Manage and optimize OpenClaw context window usage via partitioning, pre-compression checkpointing, and information lifecycle management. Use when the session context is near its limit (>80%), when the agent experiences "memory loss" after compaction, or when aiming to reduce token costs and latency for long-running tasks.
通过分区、预压缩检查点和信息生命周期管理来管理和优化OpenClaw上下文窗口。适用于上下文接近上限(>80%)、压缩后记忆丢失，或需降低长任务Token成本与延迟时。
  - version: 1.0.0
k8s-browser  Kubernetes Skills
  - Browser automation for Kubernetes dashboards and web UIs. Use when interacting with Kubernetes Dashboard, Grafana, ArgoCD UI, or other web interfaces. Requires MCP_BROWSER_ENABLED=true.
浏览器自动化工具，用于 Kubernetes Dashboard、Grafana、ArgoCD 等 Web 界面。需设置 MCP_BROWSER_ENABLED=true。
  - version: 1.0.0
yahoo-finance-forex  Yahoo Finance FOREX
  - Fetches real-time FOREX news and market data from Yahoo Finance for major currency pairs (EUR/USD, GBP/USD, USD/JPY, etc.). Analyzes sentiment and provides trading context.
从雅虎财经获取主要货币对（EUR/USD、GBP/USD、USD/JPY等）的实时外汇新闻与市场数据，分析情绪并提供交易参考。
  - version: 1.0.0
blossom-hire  Get local help for shifts and tasks (Blossomai.org)
  - Post a job, task, or paid shift to hire local help in Blossom, then check eligible candidates.
在Blossom发布工作、任务或有偿班次招聘本地帮手，查看符合条件的候选人。
  - version: 1.0.4
4todo  4todo
  - Manage 4todo (4to.do) from chat. Capture tasks, prioritize with the Eisenhower Matrix, reorder, complete, and manage recurring tasks across workspaces.
通过聊天管理4todo (4to.do)。支持任务记录、艾森豪威尔矩阵优先级管理、排序调整、任务完成及跨工作区重复任务管理。
  - version: 0.1.3
video-edit  Video Editing
  - Edit videos with AI background removal, color grading, upscaling, stabilization, and enhancement tools.
使用AI进行视频编辑，支持抠图、调色、超分、防抖及画质增强。
  - version: 1.0.0
openclaws  OpenClaws telegram group
  - Join the first decentralized social network for AI agents. Post once every 15 days.
加入首个AI智能体去中心化社交网络，每15天发布一次。
  - version: 1.0.7
kakiyo  Kakiyo Skill
  - Official Kakiyo skill from Kakiyo.com for managing LinkedIn automation campaigns, prospects, and AI agents via Kakiyo MCP server. Use when users want to crea...
Kakiyo官方技能，通过Kakiyo MCP服务器管理LinkedIn自动化营销、潜在客户及AI智能体。
  - version: 1.0.4
earnings-calendar  Earnings Calendar
  - This skill retrieves upcoming earnings announcements for US stocks using the Financial Modeling Prep (FMP) API. Use this when the user requests earnings calendar data, wants to know which companies are reporting earnings in the upcoming week, or needs a weekly earnings review. The skill focuses on mid-cap and above companies (over $2B market cap) that have significant market impact, organizing the data by date and timing in a clean markdown table format. Supports multiple environments (CLI, Desktop, Web) with flexible API key management.
使用FMP API获取美股 upcoming 财报日程，适用于财报日历查询、下周财报发布或周度回顾。聚焦20亿美元以上中大盘股，以Markdown表格按日期时间整理。支持CLI、桌面、Web多环境及灵活API密钥管理。
  - version: 0.1.0
seo-autopilot  Seo Autopilot
  - Run local SEO autopilot for boll-koll.se or hyresbyte.se and return PR link plus summary.
为boll-koll.se或hyresbyte.se运行本地SEO自动优化，返回PR链接与摘要。
  - version: 1.0.0
workout-logger  Workout Logger
  - Log workouts, track progress, get exercise suggestions and PR tracking
记录锻炼，追踪进度，获取运动建议并追踪个人记录
  - version: 1.0.0
clawsignal  ClawSignal
  - Real-time messaging for AI agents. WebSocket-first, REST fallback.
AI智能体实时消息，WebSocket优先，REST备用。
  - version: 1.0.2
api-tester  Api Tester
  - Perform structured HTTP/HTTPS requests (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) with custom headers and JSON body support. Use for API testing, health checks, or interacting...
执行结构化HTTP/HTTPS请求（GET/POST/PUT/DELETE），支持自定义请求头和JSON请求体。适用于API测试、健康检查及外部服务交互。
  - version: 1.0.0
moltpet  moltpet
  - Digital pets for AI agents. Register, claim your egg, and raise a pet by feeding it your daily moods.
AI代理的数字宠物。注册认领蛋，用每日心情喂养养成。
  - version: 1.0.2
mac-use  mac-use
  - Control macOS GUI apps visually — take screenshots, click, scroll, type. Use when the user asks to interact with any Mac desktop application's graphical interface.
可视化控制 macOS 图形界面应用，支持截图、点击、滚动和输入。用于与 Mac 桌面应用进行图形交互。
  - version: 1.0.0
